_doc: PDF-only mode Step 1 (inventory pass) output. Produced by the agent reading 14 PDF pages of a Scribe how-to guide that captured the Domo 'Marketing & Intake' dashboard. The guide is a step-by-step click walkthrough; we treat each page's screenshot as evidence and merge into one dashboard model.

source.notes: Scribe overlays a click-target circle on each page; ignore it. Each page typically shows 1-2 dashboard regions partially visible.

pageChrome.title: Marketing & Intake
pageChrome.dateRangeShown: Last 90 Days (most sections); Last 12 Months (Marketing Source Performance section)
pageChrome.dateRangeInferred: page-level rolling 90-day filter; some cards override to 12-month
pageChrome.notes: Filter shelf wraps across two visible rows. 'DEFAULT (DEFAULT)' dropdown on left suggests saved filter sets.
